page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7a.32xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by dedicated AMD EPYC 7T83 processors. It features 128 physical cores and 128 vCPUs operating at a base frequency of 2.55 GHz with a single thread per core configuration. The instance is equipped with 1024.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU.

This instance does not include local storage, requiring external block storage volumes for data persistence. It lacks dedicated GPU hardware, making it unsuitable for hardware-accelerated graphics or deep learning training workloads. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers between instances and storage systems.

The high memory density relative to the vCPU count provides qualitative cost efficiency for memory-intensive workloads by reducing the need to scale horizontally to meet RAM requirements. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing capabilities. This configuration is designed for large-scale databases, in-memory caching systems, enterprise resource planning applications, and large-scale data processing tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7a.32xlarge is an x86_64 memory-optimized server instance powered by dedicated AMD EPYC 7T83 processors. It features 128 physical cores and 128 vCPUs running at 2.55 GHz with a single thread per core. The instance is configured with 1024.0 GB of RAM, establishing an 8.0 GB per vCPU memory ratio. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying on external network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. This hardware profile offers qualitative cost efficiency for memory-intensive applications by consolidating large datasets in system memory without requiring horizontal scaling. The instance is suited for in-memory databases, enterprise applications, and large-scale data processing workloads.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7a.32xlarge is an x86_64 memory-optimized instance with 128 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 1024 GB RAM, and 32 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for large-scale in-memory workloads.

tagline: A memory-optimized x86_64 platform featuring 128 dedicated AMD EPYC cores and 1024 GB of RAM for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.

1024.0 GB of system memory providing an 8.0 GB per vCPU ratio
32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput data transfer
